## Body
Cyber Monday Flash Sale: Save 75% on MonsterInsights! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..sXO_x8AMSu4YNB4ujcnJdf0tvSTFIEGHru5bJklxj1A )


**************
🎉 Surprise! 🎉
**************

We decided that one Cyber Monday Flash Sale wasn’t enough!

So, here’s your chance to get the absolute BEST DEAL on a whole
year of MonsterInsights Pro, so that you can unlock the stats
that matter.

Hurry! Offer ends at 10 pm EST!

Claim Offer Now 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..sXO_x8AMSu4YNB4ujcnJdf0tvSTFIEGHru5bJklxj1A )

🌳🌳🌳 PLUS, this Cyber Monday, we're donating a portion of each
sale to One Tree Planted to help grow healthy forests.

Until next time,
Jolissa Skow
MonsterInsights Product Educator

*Discount applies to new purchases and upgrades only.
